description:
Established Heaven's Best Carpet Cleaning franchise serving Midland, Texas and surrounding areas including Andrews, Big Springs, Odessa, and Goldsmith. This award-winning franchise has demonstrated strong growth since opening in January 2018, generating $83,647 in annual revenue in 2025. The business contains nearly 140 reviews across Google and Yelp platforms.

BUSINESS HIGHLIGHTS:
• Exclusive territory around midland with a 650,000+ population with unlimited growth potential
• Established customer database of approximately 1,200 clients
• Proven "Dry in 1 Hour" cleaning process providing a competitive advantage
• Comprehensive service offerings: carpet cleaning, upholstery, tile & grout, and hardwood floor cleaning
• Strong online presence with established social media accounts and Google Business Profile
• Part of nationally recognized franchise system consistently ranked in Entrepreneur 500

INCLUDED ASSETS:
• Equipment package $10,000 value in equipment and $2,000 value in supplies.
• 2015 GMC Savanna Service Van (~170,000 miles, valued at around $9,500)
• All cleaning supplies and professional equipment
• Established digital assets and customer database
• Professional website and CRM software system

FRANCHISE SUPPORT:
• Four days mandatory training at corporate headquarters in Rexburg, Idaho
• Ongoing marketing support and graphic design services
• Proven business model with high-profit margins
• Low-cost marketing solutions with proven track record
• Website management assistance and CRM program

This turnkey operation offers immediate income potential with an established customer base ready to continue service. The environmentally-based cleaning products and unique one-hour drying process differentiate this franchise from traditional carpet cleaning competitors. Located in Midland, Texas, this business provides excellent expansion opportunities.
